title: GASAK
summary: An org management portal for a Malaysian MLBB esports team — squads, recruitment, events, and a public shop, all role-gated for admins, leaders, members, and sellers.
overview: GASAK is a Next.js 16 management system for a Mobile Legends esports organization. It handles squad and player rosters, recruitment applications, a shared event calendar with tournaments and scrims, announcements, and a public shop with guest checkout — all role-gated (Admin / Leader / Member / Seller) via Better Auth. Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL back the data layer, with Resend for transactional email and UploadThing for media.
highlights: Role-gated management portal (Admin / Leader / Member / Seller) for squads, players, and recruitment.
Shared event calendar for tournaments and scrims, with announcements and match logging.
Public shop with guest checkout for merchandise and rank-boost (joki) services.
Better Auth for authentication, with email/password, admin user management, and password reset.
Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL data layer with transactional email via Resend.
